Harness the power of nature's most potent medicinal mushroom with our premium organic chaga powder. Wild-harvested from pristine forests, chaga is renowned as the "King of Mushrooms" for its exceptional antioxidant content and immune-supporting properties.

Nutritional Benefits

  • High ORAC Value - Among the highest antioxidant foods on earth
  • Immune System Support - Beta-glucans boost natural immunity
  • Adaptogenic Properties - Helps body manage stress and fatigue
  • Anti-Aging Compounds - Melanin and betulinic acid for cellular health

Usage Suggestions

  • Add 1 tsp to morning smoothies or coffee
  • Blend into hot chocolate or golden milk lattes
  • Mix into yogurt or oatmeal for daily wellness

Quality & Sourcing

Our chaga is sustainably wild-harvested from pristine northern forests and carefully processed to preserve its beneficial compounds. The earthy flavor with hints of vanilla makes it perfect for hot beverages.

Enhance your tea experience with our Organic Supreme Matcha Powder, an authentic Japanese organic matcha green tea known for its vibrant bright-green color, smooth texture, and naturally sweet, umami-rich flavor. Sourced directly from Japan, our premium matcha powder is perfect for daily use, matcha lattes, smoothies, and baked goods like organic matcha cookies or tea cakes.

Why Choose Divine Ingredients' Supreme Matcha Powder?

  • We source only the best matcha green tea from Japan, free from fillers or additives, ensuring a pure matcha experience.
  • COOF Certified Organic and USDA Organic, this high-quality supreme matcha falls between ceremonial-grade and culinary-grade matcha, ideal for both sipping and recipe development.
  • Smooth, vegetal taste profile with natural sweetness and subtle umami creates a complete matcha flavor profile.
  • This gluten-free superfood is rich in antioxidants and amino acids—ideal for those looking for a clean, premium matcha option.
  • Perfect for traditional whisked matcha, matcha lattes, smoothies, and other culinary applications.
  • Cost-effective bulk matcha solution ideal for cafés, restaurants, and wellness brands.

Taste Notes:

  • Vegetal
  • Sweet
  • Smooth, umami finish

Ingredients:

100% Organic Japanese Matcha Green Tea (fine powder)

Preparation – Divine Matcha Cup Recipe:

  1. Sift ¼ teaspoon of Matcha Green Tea Powder into a mug or bowl.
  2. Add 2 oz of hot water (not boiling) and whisk briskly until powder fully dissolves and a light froth appears.
  3. Add an additional 6 oz of hot water for traditional organic matcha or steamed milk for a creamy matcha latte.
  4. Whisk again until frothy and smooth.
  5. (Optional) Sweeten with your preferred sweetener to taste.

Shop Divine Ingredients' Organic Supreme Matcha Powder in convenient retail sizes (50g, 100g, 250g, 500g, 1kg) or bulk wholesale quantities (5kg, 25kg) to ensure consistent, high-quality matcha supply. Made with first harvest organic green tea leaves, our premium matcha is a great Japanese tea option for home or business.

The Passion Berry blend is an excellent choice for both tea enthusiasts in search of a new favorite and businesses aiming to diversify their menu. We provide competitive pricing options for larger orders, making it easy for you to share this delightful tea with a wider audience.

At Divine Organic Ingredients, we believe in the power of responsibility. Pineapple Oolong Tea – A Tropical Twist on a Classic

Experience a delightful medley of flavors with our Pineapple Oolong Tea. This aromatic blend introduces exciting pineapple notes to your palate, offering a smooth sweetness that dances with every sip. Crafted from premium oolong tea leaves, juicy pineapple pieces, and vibrant calendula petals, this tea provides a refreshing escape in every cup.

Ingredients:

  • Oolong tea
  • Pineapple pieces
  • Calendula petals
  • Natural flavors

How to Use:

  1. Heat Water: Bring freshly drawn cold water to 90ºC (195ºF).
  2. Infuse Tea: Add 1 teaspoon of Pineapple Oolong Tea per cup.
  3. Steep: Let it infuse for 3-4 minutes.
  4. Enjoy: Savor the tropical aroma and smooth finish.

Perfect for both hot and iced tea lovers, our Pineapple Oolong offers a unique twist on traditional oolong teas. Its light and smooth profile makes it an ideal choice for any time of day.

Why Choose Our Pineapple Oolong Tea?

  • Premium Quality: Made with high-grade oolong tea and natural ingredients.
  • Tropical Flavor: Infused with real pineapple pieces for an authentic taste.
  • Aromatic Experience: Calendula petals add a subtle floral aroma.
  • Health Benefits: Oolong tea is known for its antioxidant properties and can support overall wellness.

Elevate your tea experience with this exquisite blend that captures the essence of a tropical paradise. Order now and let our Pineapple Oolong Tea transport you to an island getaway with every sip.

column4: Organic Ceremonial Matcha Green Tea Powder
column5:
Try our favorite matcha today! Divine Ingredients' Organic Ceremonial Matcha Powder is a premium, first-harvest Japanese green tea designed for traditional tea ceremony preparation or the casual matcha drinker looking for quality matcha. Sourced from Japan and crafted from the youngest tea leaves, this ceremonial grade matcha is our best tea and delivers a smooth, vegetal flavor with a naturally sweet finish—ideal for serving at home or in a professional setting.

Recognized for its vibrant color, clean taste, and fine texture, this organic matcha green tea powder is made for matcha drinkers who appreciate both tradition and purity. Whether you're preparing a whisked matcha in a tea bowl or adding a premium ingredient to a modern café menu, our ceremonial blend meets the highest expectations.

Why This Matcha Stands Out

  • 100% Organic ceremonial grade matcha green tea powder
  • First harvest Japanese matcha leaves sourced from the renowned region of Shizuoka
  • Delivers a bright green color, delicate aroma, and a flavor profile of highest-quality jade leaf matcha
  • Perfect for Japanese tea ceremonies, matcha lattes, smoothies, and refined culinary recipes
  • No additives or fillers—pure shade-grown organic matcha with consistent texture and flavor

Taste Notes

  • Vegetal: Fresh and grassy, without bitterness
  • Sweet: Naturally smooth, no sweeteners required
  • Umami: Subtle, savory finish often associated with high-quality organic matcha

Ingredients

  • Organic Japanese Green Tea (Ceremonial Grade)

How to Use: For the Best Matcha Cup

  1. Sift ¼ teaspoon of ceremonial grade matcha powder into a small bowl or mug to remove clumps.
  2. Add 2 ounces of hot water (around 175°F—not boiling).
  3. Using a bamboo whisk, briskly mix the organic matcha until fully dissolved and a foam layer forms.
  4. Add 6 ounces of additional hot water or steamed milk for a matcha latte.
  5. Whisk again until frothy.
  6. Optional: Add sweetener of choice.

This ceremonial grade matcha powder is best enjoyed on its own or in simple recipes where its high-quality flavor can shine. For those seeking a more authentic tea ceremony experience or premium matcha at a good price point for personal rituals, Divine Ingredients delivers consistent excellence.

Available in a variety of sizes suitable for personal use or bulk purchase, our ceremonial matcha powder is a preferred choice for cafés, wellness brands, and green tea connoisseurs alike.
